headline: UBS Downgrades Solstice Advanced Mat to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $87
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   downgrades Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) from Buy to Neutral and maintains the price target from $87 to $87.

raw.headline: UBS Downgrades Solstice Advanced Mat to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $87
